case_title: GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC VS. PAUL HUI ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210017284) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100213782) AS TO DEFENDANT HUI, PAUL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100213782) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUI, PAUL $1,769.93 PRINCIPAL, $285.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,055.33, SEE SCANNED DOC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210017284) TO PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100213782) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100213782) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-28-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210017284) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HUI, PAUL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-27-2023
DECLARATION OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210017284) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210020385) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALAXY INTERNATIONAL PURCHASING, LLC SERVED OCT-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUI, PAUL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-28-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
